chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5313 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.3616/2025 2. For order on CMA No.25461/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.11786/2023 4. For hearing of main case 21.02.2025 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General 1. Granted. 2-4. The 20 petitioners have filed this petition seeking employment in the School Education and Literacy Department on the assertion that they had cleared some initial written test. The advertisement for the same is available at page 17 of the court file and paragraph 4 of the guidelines clearly states that passing of written / objective test alone was not guarantee the job and the applicant shall have to fulfill all the terms and conditions as per Recruitment Policy, 2021. When confronted learned counsel for the petitioner could not satisfy as to how this petition could be maintained in the present form in view of the aforementioned stipulation. It is also stated that employment pursuant to the aforesaid advertisement has already taken place, however, no successful candidate has been impleaded herein. Prima facie any order passed in such respect would displace the rights of people not even arrayed before this Court. In view hereof, this petition prima facie found to be misconceived hence the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
